sun.Aries: Identity is forged in motion and first arrivals. Decisions come before reflection.
sun.Taurus: Self is rooted in the senses and the slow accumulation of what feels true. Comfort is not the enemy of substance.
sun.Gemini: Identity is multiple and adaptive. The mind is the engine; the social field is the proving ground.
sun.Cancer: Self is shaped by attachment, memory, and the houses lived in. What is loved is what is true.
sun.Leo: Identity organizes itself around being seen. Generosity is real; so is the wound when ignored.
sun.Virgo: Self is built through discernment and useful work. The world is improvable, and so is the person.
sun.Libra: Identity is shaped by relationships and the search for fairness. Decisions are weighed; balance is the instinct.
sun.Scorpio: Self runs deep and undertows. What is hidden is more authoritative than what is shown.
sun.Sagittarius: Identity is forged through pursuit of meaning. The horizon is the home.
sun.Capricorn: Self is built through structure, discipline, and the long view. Recognition is earned, not given.
sun.Aquarius: Identity stands apart, often by design. The collective matters; the individual stays a little outside it.
sun.Pisces: Self is permeable. The boundary between this person and what they feel from others is negotiable.

moon.Aries: Inner life moves in flashes. Emotions arrive at the door already armed.
moon.Taurus: Inner life is patient and physical. Comfort is the nervous system's first language.
moon.Gemini: Inner life is verbal and restless. Feelings get worked out by being spoken.
moon.Cancer: Inner life is tidal, attached to memory and home. Emotional truth runs deep but slow.
moon.Leo: Inner life wants to be witnessed. The private heart is theatrical even when no one is watching.
moon.Virgo: Inner life sorts and re-sorts. Feelings are processed by being examined.
moon.Libra: Inner life seeks symmetry. Discomfort is the absence of resolution between people.
moon.Scorpio: Inner life runs in deep channels. What is felt is felt entirely, often privately.
moon.Sagittarius: Inner life expands toward meaning. Restlessness is the baseline emotional weather.
moon.Capricorn: Inner life is contained, guarded, dutiful. Feelings get processed through what gets done.
moon.Aquarius: Inner life observes itself from a step back. Closeness is real but managed.
moon.Pisces: Inner life dissolves boundaries. What is felt is often not original to the person feeling it.

mercury.Aries: Thinks fast, speaks first, sharpens with confrontation.
mercury.Taurus: Thinks slowly and thoroughly. Once decided, hard to redirect.
mercury.Gemini: Thinks in branches, talks in spirals, collects information for its own sake.
mercury.Cancer: Thinks in memory and association. Logic is laced with emotional weight.
mercury.Leo: Thinks in narrative and grand statement. Ideas are dressed before they leave the house.
mercury.Virgo: Thinks in precision. Edits as a reflex.
mercury.Libra: Thinks in comparison and balance. Decisions hesitate by design.
mercury.Scorpio: Thinks in undertows. What is unsaid carries as much weight as what is.
mercury.Sagittarius: Thinks in big strokes. Detail loses to direction.
mercury.Capricorn: Thinks in structures. Casual statements are rare.
mercury.Aquarius: Thinks laterally and impersonally. Ideas before people.
mercury.Pisces: Thinks in feeling and image. Logic is a second pass over intuition.

venus.Aries: Loves with directness and conquest. Attraction follows pursuit.
venus.Taurus: Loves with steadiness and sensuality. Comfort is the love language.
venus.Gemini: Loves through conversation and play. Variety is part of the attachment.
venus.Cancer: Loves with care and protection. Affection is expressed by feeding people.
venus.Leo: Loves grandly. Affection wants to be public and generous.
venus.Virgo: Loves through useful service. Affection looks like things being noticed and remembered.
venus.Libra: Loves through harmony and partnership. The dynamic is the love object as much as the person.
venus.Scorpio: Loves with total intensity. Surface affection feels insulting.
venus.Sagittarius: Loves through shared adventure. Freedom is not the opposite of love.
venus.Capricorn: Loves with patience and commitment. Affection is measured, demonstrated through reliability.
venus.Aquarius: Loves with respect for independence. Companionship matters more than fusion.
venus.Pisces: Loves dissolvingly. The boundary between this person and the beloved gets soft.

mars.Aries: Acts first. The will is loud and impatient.
mars.Taurus: Acts steadily once decided. Hard to start; harder to stop.
mars.Gemini: Acts through words and quick maneuvers. Action is verbal as often as physical.
mars.Cancer: Acts protectively. Aggression turns sideways through care.
mars.Virgo: Acts precisely. Energy goes into method as much as outcome.
mars.Libra: Acts diplomatically. Conflict is avoided until it's not.
mars.Scorpio: Acts with intensity and patience. Vengeance is plausible.
mars.Sagittarius: Acts in pursuit. The chase is the action.
mars.Capricorn: Acts strategically. Anger is cold and goal-directed.
mars.Aquarius: Acts unpredictably. Will is principled and a little contrarian.
mars.Pisces: Acts indirectly. Direct confrontation is rare; influence is preferred.

jupiter.Aries: Growth comes through bold first attempts.
jupiter.Gemini: Growth comes through learning and being curious in public.
jupiter.Cancer: Growth comes through care, family, the hearth.
jupiter.Leo: Growth comes through performance, generosity, and being recognized.
jupiter.Virgo: Growth comes through service and skill.
jupiter.Libra: Growth comes through partnership and shared aesthetics.
jupiter.Scorpio: Growth comes through depth and survival of difficult passages.
jupiter.Sagittarius: Growth comes through philosophy, travel, and big convictions.
jupiter.Capricorn: Growth comes through structure, ambition, and earned position.
jupiter.Aquarius: Growth comes through community and ideas larger than the self.
jupiter.Pisces: Growth comes through compassion and porous boundaries.

saturn.Aries: Discipline is hardest when the work requires patience.
saturn.Taurus: Discipline is around possession and the fear of going without.
saturn.Gemini: Discipline is around quieting the mind and finishing the thought.
saturn.Cancer: Discipline is around emotional self-protection and the family pattern.
saturn.Leo: Discipline is around ego and the need to be seen.
saturn.Virgo: Discipline is around perfectionism that turns inward as criticism.
saturn.Libra: Discipline is around commitment and not abandoning the relationship at the first edge.
saturn.Scorpio: Discipline is around control and the willingness to release it.
saturn.Sagittarius: Discipline is around following through after the initial enthusiasm.
saturn.Capricorn: Discipline is the native fluency. Saturn's home sign.
saturn.Aquarius: Discipline is around integration with the group without losing the self.
saturn.Pisces: Discipline is around boundaries and not dissolving into the feeling.

uranus.Aries: Breakthroughs come through impulsive, self-directed action.
uranus.Taurus: Breakthroughs disrupt the relationship with material stability.
uranus.Gemini: Breakthroughs come through unconventional ideas and rapid information.
uranus.Cancer: Breakthroughs disrupt home, family, and security.
uranus.Virgo: Breakthroughs come through new methods and rethought systems.
uranus.Libra: Breakthroughs disrupt relationships and the idea of partnership.
uranus.Scorpio: Breakthroughs come through power dynamics and the willingness to burn it down.
uranus.Sagittarius: Breakthroughs come through unorthodox beliefs and unexpected travel.
uranus.Capricorn: Breakthroughs disrupt structures, hierarchies, the established order.
uranus.Aquarius: Breakthroughs are the native frequency. Uranus's home sign.
uranus.Pisces: Breakthroughs come through dissolution of boundaries and the spiritual sudden.

neptune.Aries: Imagination acts directly, often confusing self with cause.
neptune.Gemini: Imagination disperses through ideas; truth is slippery.
neptune.Cancer: Imagination weaves family myth and emotional memory.
neptune.Leo: Imagination is performative, theatrical, sometimes self-deceiving.
neptune.Virgo: Imagination meets practical work; the line between insight and overthinking blurs.
neptune.Scorpio: Imagination dwells in the unseen and the deeply felt.
neptune.Sagittarius: Imagination expands into faith, philosophy, and seeking.
neptune.Capricorn: Imagination meets structure; dreams get architectural.
neptune.Aquarius: Imagination serves the collective and the future.
neptune.Pisces: Imagination is the native medium. Neptune's home sign.

pluto.Aries: Power transforms through direct, decisive action.
pluto.Taurus: Power transforms through ownership and what is held.
pluto.Gemini: Power transforms through information and language.
pluto.Cancer: Power transforms through family, ancestry, and emotional roots.
pluto.Leo: Power transforms through self-expression and the will to be seen.
pluto.Virgo: Power transforms through the patient work of remaking the system.
pluto.Libra: Power transforms through relationships and what they expose.
pluto.Scorpio: Power transforms through depth, sex, death, and resurrection. Pluto's home sign.
pluto.Sagittarius: Power transforms through belief and the willingness to overturn it.
pluto.Capricorn: Power transforms through institutions and the slow rebuilding of authority.
pluto.Aquarius: Power transforms through collective movements and structural change.
pluto.Pisces: Power transforms through dissolution and what is surrendered.

ascendant.Aries: Arrives forward, fast, and visible. First impressions: direct, sometimes blunt.
ascendant.Taurus: Arrives steady and grounded. First impressions: solid, slow to warm.
ascendant.Gemini: Arrives talking. First impressions: quick, curious, scattered.
ascendant.Cancer: Arrives cautiously. First impressions: gentle, watchful, slightly guarded.
ascendant.Leo: Arrives radiantly. First impressions: warm and presentational.
ascendant.Virgo: Arrives precisely. First impressions: composed, attentive to detail.
ascendant.Libra: Arrives charmingly. First impressions: agreeable, well-turned-out.
ascendant.Scorpio: Arrives intensely. First impressions: magnetic, slightly threatening, hard to read.
ascendant.Sagittarius: Arrives expansively. First impressions: enthusiastic, philosophical, loud.
ascendant.Capricorn: Arrives formally. First impressions: contained, capable, older than their age.
ascendant.Aquarius: Arrives slightly apart. First impressions: distinctive, intellectual, cool.
ascendant.Pisces: Arrives softly. First impressions: dreamy, hard to pin down, sympathetic.

midheaven.Aries: Public path is forged through initiative and being first.
midheaven.Taurus: Public path is built slowly and held steadily.
midheaven.Gemini: Public path involves communication, teaching, or being a node in many networks.
midheaven.Cancer: Public path involves care, nurturance, or stewardship of a community.
midheaven.Leo: Public path involves recognition. The work wants applause.
midheaven.Virgo: Public path involves service, expertise, and craft.
midheaven.Libra: Public path involves partnership, mediation, or the arts of agreement.
midheaven.Scorpio: Public path involves transformation, research, or work at the edge of what is shown.
midheaven.Sagittarius: Public path involves teaching, travel, or the spreading of meaning.
midheaven.Capricorn: Public path involves structure, achievement, and the long climb.
midheaven.Aquarius: Public path involves innovation and serving something larger than the self.
midheaven.Pisces: Public path involves art, compassion, or the dissolving of conventional roles.

houses.1: How the person enters a room. Identity made visible. Body, presence, first move.
houses.2: What the person owns, values, and earns. Self-worth made material.
houses.3: Daily mind, siblings, near environment, short journeys, the texture of communication.
houses.4: Home, family of origin, the inner foundation. What is private and rooted.
houses.5: Creation, romance, play, children, what is given form by joy.
houses.6: Work, health, daily routine, service. The rhythms that build or wear down the body.
houses.7: Partnership, the close other, the mirror. Open enemies live here too.
houses.8: Shared resources, sex, inheritance, what is given to and taken from. Death, transformation, the underground.
houses.9: Higher mind, philosophy, distant travel, belief, the search for meaning.
houses.10: Public face, career, ambition, the visible peak of what the person becomes.
houses.11: Friendships, networks, future, hopes, the wider circle.
houses.12: What is hidden, the unconscious, secrets, retreat, what is given up. Dissolution and the larger self.

aspects.sun-Conjunction-moon: Inner and outer self speak the same language. Drive and instinct rarely contradict.
aspects.sun-Sextile-moon: Quiet alignment between will and feeling. Friction is light.
aspects.sun-Square-moon: Will and feeling pull against each other. Identity feels divided between what's wanted and what's needed.
aspects.sun-Trine-moon: Inner life supports outer expression. Confidence comes from emotional ground.
aspects.sun-Opposition-moon: Public self and private self sit across a table from each other. Integration is a daily project.
aspects.sun-Conjunction-mercury: Identity expresses through language. The voice is central to who the person is.
aspects.sun-Conjunction-venus: Identity expressed through warmth and relationship. Charming by default.
aspects.sun-Conjunction-mars: Identity expressed through will and assertion. Drive is loud.
aspects.sun-Square-mars: Effort and ambition collide. Drive becomes self-defeating when unmanaged.
aspects.sun-Trine-mars: Will and identity reinforce each other. Action follows intention cleanly.
aspects.sun-Square-saturn: Identity meets restriction early. Self-doubt is a structural feature.
aspects.sun-Square-pluto: Identity faces forces that demand transformation. Power struggles with self.
aspects.sun-Trine-jupiter: Identity expands easily. Optimism is structural.
aspects.sun-Conjunction-jupiter: Identity wants to be large. Generosity is automatic; restraint is the work.
aspects.mercury-Conjunction-moon: Thinking and feeling fuse. Speech reveals emotion involuntarily.
aspects.mercury-Square-moon: Words and feelings argue. The mind processes what the heart hasn't accepted.
aspects.moon-Trine-venus: Affection flows easily. The inner life is hospitable.
aspects.moon-Square-venus: Need and love want different things. Affection is complicated by emotional history.
aspects.moon-Conjunction-mars: Feelings come armed. Reactivity is high.
aspects.moon-Square-mars: Inner life and assertion clash. Anger arrives faster than thought.
aspects.moon-Trine-mars: Feeling and action work together. Conviction is emotional.
aspects.moon-Square-saturn: Emotion meets restraint. Inner life feels lonely or duty-bound.
aspects.moon-Conjunction-saturn: Feelings are contained, sometimes suppressed. Maturity is early; warmth is hard-won.
aspects.moon-Opposition-pluto: Emotional life faces buried intensity. Triggers run deep.
aspects.moon-Conjunction-neptune: Inner life dissolves boundaries. Feels what others feel, sometimes too much.
aspects.mars-Square-mercury: Speech sharpens into combat. Words used as weapons.
aspects.mars-Trine-mercury: Mind and action align. Decisions get executed.
aspects.mercury-Conjunction-venus: Speech is charming. Words are aesthetic.
aspects.mercury-Conjunction-saturn: Mind is disciplined and slow. Thinks before speaking.
aspects.mercury-Square-saturn: Self-doubt around speaking. Words feel inadequate or get blocked.
aspects.mercury-Opposition-neptune: Communication blurs. Truth and imagination get tangled.
aspects.mercury-Conjunction-pluto: Speech carries weight. Words investigate; words uncover.
aspects.venus-Conjunction-mars: Desire and affection align. Attraction is direct.
aspects.venus-Square-mars: Friction between affection and desire. Fiery, sometimes counterproductive.
aspects.venus-Trine-mars: Romance and assertiveness cooperate. Pursuit feels natural.
aspects.venus-Opposition-mars: Love and desire face off. Attraction is intense and complicated.
aspects.venus-Square-saturn: Affection meets restraint. Love feels weighty, sometimes withheld.
aspects.venus-Conjunction-saturn: Love is committed, slow to declare, durable.
aspects.venus-Conjunction-jupiter: Affection is generous, expansive, romantic in scale.
aspects.venus-Conjunction-neptune: Love is idealized. Disillusionment is a feature, not a bug.
aspects.venus-Square-pluto: Love faces compulsion. Attraction is intense and sometimes destructive.
aspects.venus-Conjunction-pluto: Love is consuming, transformative, hard to hold lightly.
aspects.jupiter-Trine-mars: Action is confident and expansive. Effort gets rewarded.
aspects.jupiter-Conjunction-mars: Drive is amplified. Ambition is loud.
aspects.mars-Square-saturn: Effort meets resistance. Frustration is structural.
aspects.mars-Conjunction-pluto: Will and power fuse. Drive is intense, sometimes ruthless.
aspects.mars-Square-pluto: Will faces forces that demand surrender or transformation.
aspects.jupiter-Conjunction-saturn: Optimism and structure balance. Growth is measured.
aspects.jupiter-Square-saturn: Expansion and restriction tug at each other.
aspects.neptune-Square-saturn: Structure meets dissolution. Reality and imagination clash.
aspects.neptune-Conjunction-pluto: Generational signature; dissolution meets transformation at scale.
aspects.uranus-Opposition-pluto: Disruption faces transformation. Change is structural and inevitable.
aspects.saturn-Conjunction-pluto: Structures undergo deep transformation; old forms break under pressure.
aspects.saturn-Square-uranus: Structure and disruption clash; rebellion meets responsibility.
